name: XOR
tagline: A meta-model based JSON transformation library
body:
# Summary
The XOR tool enhances an ORM solution by making it easier for the developer to work with rich domain models and also to integrate the domain smoothly with a REST API.

# Prerequisites
The implementation uses existing JPA annotations in the code to build the meta-model of the business domain.
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
